title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 228.368
text:
228.368.  Costs. — The costs of the proceedings to establish or widen a private road incurred up to and including the filing of the commissioners' report shall be paid by the plaintiff; and the court, as to any costs incurred in proceedings subsequent thereto, including the costs of the jury trial, may make such order as in its discretion may be deemed just, including, in the case of a proceeding to obtain a maintenance order, assessing the costs to all benefitted homeowners.
(L. 1991 S.B. 138 § 9, A.L. 2012 H.B. 1103)
